title: ctenitis poolii
intro: Ctenitis poolii, also known as the Pool's ctenitis, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ctenitis poolii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it accessible for use in folk medicine.
